/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libcollectiveRlTransport.so -o libcollectiveRlTransport.so CMakeFiles/collectiveRlTransport.dir/collectiveRlTransport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/collectiveRlTransport.dir/collectiveRlTransport_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o  -L/usr/local/lib/argos3  -L/home/jbloom/Documents/Nest/Research/RL-CollectiveTransport/server -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/argos3:/home/jbloom/Documents/Nest/Research/RL-CollectiveTransport/server:/usr/local/lib:/home/jbloom/Documents/Nest/Research/RL-CollectiveTransport/build/server /usr/local/lib/libbuzz.so -largos3core_simulator -largos3plugin_simulator_dynamics2d -largos3plugin_simulator_entities -largos3plugin_simulator_footbot -largos3plugin_simulator_genericrobot -largos3plugin_simulator_media -largos3plugin_simulator_qtopengl -largos3plugin_simulator_buzz server/libserverclient.so -lzmq
